title: FATHIYA Security and AI Report — Scope-Aware Knowledge
summary: Security and cyber AI report material ingested as scope-aware, policy-gated knowledge. This card captures security awareness insights without creating live exploit, testing, or scanning workflows.
key_principles: Security/cyber reports are source material for knowledge enrichment only.
All security knowledge is scope-aware: it respects the boundaries defined in PB005 Target Cards and Scope Maps.
Policy-gated: no live exploit workflows, vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, or external probing is authorized from this material.
Security insights inform risk awareness, architecture hardening, and policy development.
Any future security-related execution requires explicit operator approval and a formal written policy per ADR-002/ADR-003.
boundary: Scope-aware security knowledge only. No live exploit, testing, scanning, or external probing workflows. Requires formal policy before any active security engagement.
